zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gooche於1470年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾紐藍德時，他的父親Geoffrey Gooch31歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Treherne22歲。他和Jane Joan Van Brugge至少有1個女兒。他去世於1538年7月28日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Gooche于1470年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾紐藍德时，他的父亲Geoffrey Gooch31岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Treherne22岁。他和Jane Joan Van Brugge至少有1个女儿。他去世于1538年7月28日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gooche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gosch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Claus, Erwin, Guenther, Heinz, Helmut, Kurt.
North German (also Gösch): from a shortened form of the personal name Godschalk, Low German form of Gottschalk .
South German (Bavaria and Austria): nickname from Gosche(n) ‘mouth’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Gooche was born in 1470, in Newland, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Geoffrey Gooch, was 31 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Treherne, was 22. He had at least 1 daughter with Jane Joan Van Brugge. He died on 28 July 1538, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Gooche est né en 1470, à Newland, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey Gooch, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Treherne, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Jane Joan Van Brugge. Il est décédé le 28 juillet 1538, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Gooche 1470 in Newland, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey Gooch 31 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Treherne 22. Er hatte mit Jane Joan Van Brugge mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 28. Juli 1538 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Gooche è nato il nel 1470 nel Newland, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Geoffrey Gooch, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Treherne, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Jane Joan Van Brugge. Morì il 28 luglio 1538, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Goocheが1470年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアニューランドで生まれた時，父Geoffrey Goochは31歳，母Lady Elizabeth Treherneは22歳であった。彼はJane Joan Van Bruggeとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1538年7月28日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gooche(이)가 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 뉴랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey Gooch(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Treherne(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Jane Joan Van Brugge(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 7월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Gooche nasceu em 1470, em Newland, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey Gooch, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Treherne, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Jane Joan Van Brugge. Ele faleceu em 28 de julho de 1538, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Gooche родился в 1470 г. в местности нюланд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Geoffrey Gooch было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Treherne, 22. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Jane Joan Van Brugge. Он умер 28 июля 1538 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Gooche nació en 1470, en Newland, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey Gooch, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Treherne, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Jane Joan Van Brugge. Murió el 28 de julio de 1538, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años.
